name: invois-macos
description: Invois — local-first invoice generator for macOS (Electron + Next.js).
author: Arif Riyanto

comments.dependencies: READ THIS BEFORE ADDING ONE. electron-builder ships EVERY package listed under `dependencies` into the .app — verbatim, as source. Our UI is a static export: `next build` bundles React, radix, lucide, date-fns and the rest INTO out/, and none of them are ever require()d at runtime. The only package the running app loads from node_modules is pdf-lib, in the main process. So: anything the UI imports belongs in devDependencies. Getting this wrong is not subtle — with the frontend libs under `dependencies` the packaged app was 649 MB, of which 370 MB was node_modules (next alone: 275 MB of build tooling that never runs).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n next,electron -c blue,magenta "next dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.size: du -sh dist/*/Invois.app 2>/dev/null || echo 'nothing built yet — run a pack:* script first'
